content.en:
The Daoless Tower is divided into towers, cultivating time and space.

Ye Tian sat cross-legged, and golden flowers appeared around him, these golden flowers were all pole-making substances, and in fact, the real name was Pole-making Golden Flower.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian's Extreme Creation Body absorbs the Extreme Creation Substances of these Extreme Golden Flowers, although the Extreme Creation Materials contained in each Extreme Golden Flower are not very many, but they are better than the quantity!

In addition, Ye Tian himself was not very far away from breaking the second pole-making chain, so after absorbing a large number of pole-making golden flowers and other resources, the second pole-making chain was finally revealed.

Rumble!!!!

The golden Chainchain of Pole Creation appears in the root of the Body of Mastery, containing terrifying power, and it is even more difficult to break than the first Chain.

However, Ye Tian was very confident.

Soon, all the dense Pole Creation Golden Flowers around were absorbed, and many resources were also taken out and used, for this breakthrough, Ye Tian could be said to have exhausted all his resources, just to impact the second Pole Creation Chain.

As time passed, the second chain of Pole Creation began to crack, and the rate at which resources were consumed was incomparably faster.

Long years have passed.

Finally, on this day, before all the resources were almost exhausted, Ye Tian finally broke this second pole chain completely.

Suddenly, the second pole-making chain turned into an incomparably pure pole-making origin and merged into Ye Tian's pole-making body, and Ye Tian's strength was skyrocketing.

After a long time, Ye Tian's ascension officially ended.

"The strength has improved a lot, if you fight the Lord of the Tyrannosaurus with your current strength, you can easily suppress him, and you don't even need to use the perfect treasure!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Of course, he is still not very strong among the half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Creation Realm, and he can only say that the Tyrannosaurus Lord is too weak.

In the following days, Ye Tian copied more perfection-level ancestral endowments while practicing the Creation Perfection Control Technique, after all, he had only mastered a Perfection Creation Technique now, and if he mastered more Perfection Creation Techniques, his strength would inevitably increase a lot.

And for Ye Tian, it was not difficult to create more Extreme Perfection Techniques, and it didn't take much time.

As a result, over the years, Ye Tian has created many Extreme Perfection Control Techniques, such as the Extreme Battle Body, the Extreme Instantaneous Shadow, the Extreme Shadow Thorn, the Extreme Mist Body, and the Extreme Devouring Domain.

Unconsciously, Ye Tian had been in retreat and practicing for more than 300,000 eternal years.

At this time, Ye Tian's strength skyrocketed, and he was much stronger than at the beginning.

However, he still only broke the two pole-making chains, and there was still a gap between breaking the third pole-making chain, mainly because of the lack of pole-making materials, otherwise he would not have broken the third pole-making chain so far.

However, the Extreme Creation Substance was too rare, and even if he was a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm, he would not be able to obtain too much Extreme Creation Substance.

"In terms of combat effectiveness alone, I'm not weaker than those half-step perfection controllers of the Extreme Creation Realm who have broken the three chains of Extreme Creation, and even their combat power is much higher, after all, they don't have so many Extreme Creation Perfection Skills as I do!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He also knows very well that if there is not much opportunity, in the next long years, his strength will improve very slowly, and there is no way to do it.

For example, those half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Creation Realm of the Wudao Tower have been the half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Creation Realm for countless years, and they still choose to stay in the half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Creation Realm, but the improvement of their strength is too slow.

For the half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm, the cultivation years are all measured in millions of eternal years, and how long Ye Tiancai has been cultivating is just a nap time for other half-step perfect masters of the Extreme Creation Realm.

......

Origin Boundary Sea.

Ever since the Ten Elements Ancestors left here and went to the Eternal Ruins, there has been a lot of competition in the Origin Realm Sea, because the Ten Elements Ancestors have left, which means that some resources have been vacated.

Before, many of the precious resources were held by the Ten Elements Ancestors, who were half-step perfect controllers, but now that they are gone, they don't even have their clones left, so a lot of resources are vacant.

Few people dared to fight for the resources left by the Ten Elements Ancestors, but the resources left by the Realm Ancestors and the Primordial Ancestors were robbed of a lot.

Of course, on the whole, the Origin Realm Sea still hasn't changed much.

And yet this day.

Many powerful Boundary's Creatures have appeared one after another in the Boundary's Frontier area around the Origin Boundary's Sea, and the Boundary's Frontier creatures around the Origin Boundary's Sea are all very weak, and they have barely reached the Eternal Master, so they are not worth mentioning.

But now, all of these newly emerged Realm Realm creatures are Eternal Masters, and some have even reached the level of Seven or Eight Realm Masters.

At the beginning, those powerhouses in the Origin Realm Sea didn't pay much attention to it, and some Nine Realm-level controllers took action and slaughtered these Realm Realm creatures.

But then, some Realm Rim creatures comparable to the Ten Realms-level Masters appeared, which immediately attracted the attention of the Ten Realm-level Masters.

Of course.

They still didn't realize the seriousness of the matter, but with the occurrence of an incident, it completely shocked the entire Origin Realm Sea.

A Ten Realm-level Master has fallen!

You must know that there are not many Ten Realm-level Masters in the Origin Realm Sea, and now with the departure of the Black Decay Masters and the Primordial Masters, the number of Ten Realm-level Controllers has suddenly decreased.

The remaining dozens of Ten Realm-level Masters are not powerful, and the fall of a Ten Realm-level Masters is an extremely sensational big thing!

The Origin Sea, somewhere void.

One by one, the Ten Realm-level controllers gathered here, including the Ancient Demon Controller, the Snow Maiden Controller, the Jinyu Controller, and other Ten Realm-level controllers.

At this time, Jin Yu's controller, the first marksman of the Origin Realm Sea, said: "Now that the Origin Realm Sea is in trouble, I have spied dozens of Boundary Boundary Creatures that are comparable to the Ten Realms Realm Masters level, and the number of Boundary Boundary Creatures is still increasing, it is not clear how many Boundary Boundary Creatures will appear." If the Great Beings were still there, these creatures at the end of the realm would not be afraid, but now that they have all gone to the ruins of eternity, it will be difficult for the Origin Realm Sea to resist them!"

"Or hide in the Origin Realm Sea?"

A Ten Realm-level controller suggested.

"No!" the Ancient Demon Master shook his head, "As long as those creatures don't exceed the Ten Realms Realm Controller level, they can still enter the Origin Realm Sea, so you can't let them in, otherwise it will be even more difficult to deal with." "

"This time, we must combine the power of the entire Origin Realm Sea to clean up these Realm Creatures, and we can't let them continue to gather, otherwise when their numbers increase again, once they all hit over, it will be too difficult to stop!"

The Snow Maiden Controller suggested.

"Then let's make a move, everyone's will clone will make a move as soon as possible. Luckily, these creatures at the end of the world don't have willpower clones, so we still have an advantage in numbers. Remember, everyone must work together this time, otherwise we will lose the Origin Realm Sea, and we will have no place to live!"

Jin Yu said.

"That's nature!"

The other Ten Realm-level masters nodded.
